mapper.select:
SELECT SEQ, AFFIRM_TYPE, APPLY_NO, APPLY_TYPE, APPLY_PERSON_ID, AFFIRM_PERSON_ID, TITLE, AFFIRM_LEVEL, AFFIRM_FLAG, AFFIRM_URL, ACTIVITY, APPLY_TYPE_CODE, APPLY_PERSON_INFO, APPLY_AFFIRM_FLAG, APPLY_FLAG, READ_FLAG, EMAIL_TITLE, EMAIL_CONTENT, SEND_FLAG, AFFIRM_CONTENT, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DATE, CREATED_IP, CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_IP, UPDATED_BY, TO_CHAR(AFFIRM_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS AFFIRM_DATE FROM SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL WHERE 1=1
AND APPLY_NO LIKE '%' || #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND UPPER(APPLY_PERSON_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{applyPersonId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%'
AND UPPER(AFFIRM_PERSON_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{affirmPersonId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%'
ORDER BY SEQ DESC

SELECT SEQ, AFFIRM_TYPE, APPLY_NO, APPLY_TYPE, APPLY_PERSON_ID, AFFIRM_PERSON_ID, TITLE, AFFIRM_LEVEL, AFFIRM_FLAG, AFFIRM_URL, ACTIVITY, APPLY_TYPE_CODE, APPLY_PERSON_INFO, APPLY_AFFIRM_FLAG, APPLY_FLAG, READ_FLAG, EMAIL_TITLE, EMAIL_CONTENT, SEND_FLAG, AFFIRM_CONTENT, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DATE, CREATED_IP, CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_IP, UPDATED_BY, TO_CHAR(AFFIRM_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS AFFIRM_DATE FROM SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL ( SEQ, AFFIRM_TYPE, APPLY_NO, APPLY_TYPE, APPLY_PERSON_ID, AFFIRM_PERSON_ID, TITLE, AFFIRM_LEVEL, AFFIRM_FLAG, AFFIRM_URL, ACTIVITY, APPLY_TYPE_CODE, APPLY_PERSON_INFO, APPLY_AFFIRM_FLAG, APPLY_FLAG, READ_FLAG, EMAIL_TITLE, EMAIL_CONTENT, SEND_FLAG, AFFIRM_DATE, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP ) VALUES ( ESS_AFFIRM_SEQ.NEXTVAL, NVL(#{affirmType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1), #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{affirmPersonId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GET_CODE_NAME(#{applyType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || ' ' || #{lastName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{affirmLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, DECODE(#{applyTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'31','/ess/infoApply/viewApprovaledOt','21','/ess/infoApply/viewApprovaledLeave','218197','/ess/infoApply/viewAttendanceEx'), DECODE(#{affirmLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR},1,0,3), #{applyTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyPersonInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyAffirmFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, '【approval to remind】【CHR】' || GET_CODE_NAME(#{applyTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || #{lastName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emailContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DECODE(#{affirmLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR},1,0,2), DECODE(#{affirmLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR},0,SYSDATE), SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL WHERE APPLY_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT SEQ, AFFIRM_TYPE, APPLY_NO, APPLY_TYPE, APPLY_PERSON_ID, AFFIRM_PERSON_ID, TITLE, AFFIRM_LEVEL, AFFIRM_FLAG, AFFIRM_URL, APPLY_FLAG, APPLY_TYPE_CODE, APPLY_PERSON_INFO, GET_CODE_NAME(APPLY_AFFIRM_FLAG, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS APPLY_AFFIRM_FLAG, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_DATE, ACTIVITY, READ_FLAG FROM SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL EM WHERE ACTIVITY = 0 AND AFFIRM_PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND APPLY_AFFIRM_FLAG NOT IN ('14014310', '14014309', '14014308') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB TB WHERE TB.APPLY_NO = EM.APPLY_NO AND TB.BATCH_YN = 2) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ESS_APPLY_OT OT WHERE OT.APPLY_NO = EM.APPLY_NO AND OT.BATCH_YN = 2)
AND UPPER(TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{titleSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%'
AND APPLY_TYPE_CODE = #{applyTypeCodeSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC

SELECT SEQ, AFFIRM_TYPE, APPLY_NO, APPLY_TYPE, APPLY_PERSON_ID, AFFIRM_PERSON_ID, TITLE, AFFIRM_LEVEL, AFFIRM_FLAG, AFFIRM_URL, APPLY_FLAG, APPLY_TYPE_CODE, APPLY_PERSON_INFO, GET_CODE_NAME(APPLY_AFFIRM_FLAG, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS APPLY_AFFIRM_FLAG, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_DATE, 'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_DATE, ACTIVITY, READ_FLAG FROM SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL EM WHERE ACTIVITY IN ('0', '1') AND AFFIRM_PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AFFIRM_TYPE NOT IN (3, 4) AND APPLY_AFFIRM_FLAG IN ('14014308', '14014309', '14014310') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB TB WHERE TB.APPLY_NO = EM.APPLY_NO AND TB.BATCH_YN = 2) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ESS_APPLY_OT OT WHERE OT.APPLY_NO = EM.APPLY_NO AND OT.BATCH_YN = 2) AND CREATE_DATE >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY.MM') || '.01', 'YYYY.MM.DD')
AND UPPER(TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{titleSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%'
AND APPLY_TYPE_CODE = #{applyTypeCodeSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC
mapper.update: {CALL PKG_AFFIRM_EMAIL.PR_AFFIRM_EXECUTE( #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=IN}, #{applyType, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=IN}, #{applyFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=IN}, #{flag, jdbcType=INTEGER, mode=IN}, #{affirmContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=IN}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=IN}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=IN}, #{affirmLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=IN}, #{message, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=OUT} )}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB EL WHERE EL.AFFIRM_FLAG = 14014308 AND EL.PERSON_ID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND EL.ACTIVITY = '1' AND EL.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND EL.CONFIRM_FLAG = '0'

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ESS_CARD_APPLY_TB EC WHERE EC.AFFIRM_FLAG = '14014308' AND EC.ACTIVITY = '1' AND EC.PERSON_ID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND EC.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND EC.CONFIRM_FLAG = '0'

SELECT SEQ, AFFIRM_TYPE, APPLY_NO, APPLY_TYPE, APPLY_PERSON_ID, AFFIRM_PERSON_ID, TITLE, AFFIRM_LEVEL, AFFIRM_FLAG, AFFIRM_URL, APPLY_FLAG, APPLY_TYPE_CODE, APPLY_PERSON_INFO, GET_CODE_NAME(APPLY_AFFIRM_FLAG, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS APPLY_AFFIRM_FLAG, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_DATE, 'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_DATE, ACTIVITY, READ_FLAG FROM SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL WHERE AFFIRM_PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AFFIRM_TYPE IN (3, 4) AND CREATE_DATE >= ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY.MM') || '.01', 'YYYY.MM.DD'), -1)
AND UPPER(TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{titleSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%'
AND APPLY_TYPE_CODE = #{applyTypeCodeSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC
